label: light
groundingNote: something of one kind; people cannot touch it; when it is in a place, people can see the things in this place; when it is not in a place, people cannot see the things in this place; it is in a place because of the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m], because of {urn:molecule-v0:fire|fire} [m], because of some things people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make}
notes: Percept molecule; dominant TinyStories sense of 'light' is the noun. Grounds shiny/shine/star transitively.
